# Simple CAPI

> Simple CAPI is self-service Meta conversion tracking software for agencies and businesses.

## Product

- Creates a ready-to-install Lead or Schedule conversion setup.
- Provides one hosted installation script.
- Keeps sensitive Meta credentials out of page code.
- Costs $5 USD per conversion setup as a one-time payment.
- Lead and Schedule are purchased separately; enabling both costs $10 USD.

## Canonical site

- [Simple CAPI](https://simplecapi.com/): Official product homepage.
